about.title: About Me
about.description: Master's graduate in Cloud Computing & Mobility (UPJV / INSSET) after a two-year apprenticeship at Renault Digital. Four professional web-development experiences: Renault Digital apprenticeship, IoT internship at Faubourg Numérique, and two associative PHP/MySQL internships.

terminal.aboutLine1: Apprentice developer at Renault Digital, Master Cloud Computing & Mobility student.
terminal.aboutLine2: Four pro experiences: Renault Digital (Java/Spring), Faubourg Numérique (Vue/Node IoT), Chatterie de Brasco ×2 (PHP/MySQL).
terminal.project2Desc: Connected & Sustainable Territory IoT platform (Vue.js + Node.js)
terminal.project3Desc: Chatterie de la Terre de Brasco showcase site (PHP/MySQL)
terminal.whoami: An apprentice who loves turning coffee into Java code ☕→💻
terminal.helpExtra: Standard commands also work. Try ls, cd, cat, git, npm…
